response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar
ATTR departure_location_id : varchar
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar
ATTR arrival_location_id : varchar
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar
ATTR flight_status : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewRole
PK role_name
ATTR role_name : varchar : PK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_name
ATTR status_name : varchar : PK

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role_name : varchar : FK

REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1..N : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 2 : FK=departure_airport_id, FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_status
REL Airport -> Location : 1 -> 1 : FK=location_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewRole : 1..N -> 1 : FK=role_name
